mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coverage_run WHERE run_id = #{runId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM coverage_run WHERE coverage_set_id = #{coverageSetId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM coverage_run WHERE coverage_set_id = #{coverageSetId}
mapper.update: UPDATE coverage_run SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE run_id = #{runId}
